title: The Stoned Golem
description: This is the official Modpack for The Stoned Golem SMP
body:
# **The Stoned Golem**  
**TSG** is a Proximity Voice Chat Community based server with a bunch of additions to its ALL of which are completely optional! Any features that add to or take away from the Vanilla experience can easily be toggled off for the people who want a fully Vanilla Experience while still offering a fun place for the ones who want a little more than just Vanilla but not too much change, TSG is almost 3 years old, never has and never will reset.

- **What to expect?**

1. TSG is running in Hard Mode.
2. We have a Creative Server where you have access to use world edit to build your ideas.
3. EVERYTHING on the server is free only monetary gain is through Donations.
4. Constant updates & Server Events.
5. Community Hosted Events.

- **Features you will find on TSG**

1. **Proximity Voice Chat:** Makes it easier to meet new people, make new friends, and overall adds a lot of unexpected fun to the feel of the server.
2. **Custom Cosmetic Items:** We have a LARGE amount of custom cosmetics (don't use the resource pack for Vanilla though its recommended).
3. **Crates:** There are 4 Crates that are always there, and we have Seasonal Crates that are temporary, Everything is free on TSG, you can get Crate keys by voting.
4. **Claims:** We use Claims to make sure everyone is safe from griefing, though the community is for the most part friendly and understanding, it is still a public server.
5. **Ban From Claims:** If you ever find yourself in a situation and you want the person(s) out of your claim you can kick/ban them from your claim.
6. **Toggleable PvP:** For people who enjoy PvP and those who don't, you have the option to turn it on or off.
7. **Graves:** Deaths should have a punishment but nothing game ruining, you get 3 graves with a 24h timer.
8. **Waystones:** Excessive exploring can be boring, Teleporting can be too dull, with Waystones you still need to explore but once you find a friends house or make one of your own, you can use Waystones to teleport to another Waystone you have activated.

There's so much more to the server and it's unique in many ways with a decent size community, join and start exploring!

- **What resouce packs does the Modpack include?**
1. TSGPack.zip **(To see all the cosmetics and custom items on the server using ItemsAdder)**
2. TSGMusic.zip **(To be able to listen to the custom music the server offers)**

_**Both are optional but will make the experience better on TSG**_

- **IP & Links:**

**SMP IP:** thestonedgolem.live

**Creative Server IP:** creative.thestonedgolem.live

**Bedrock IP:** 170.205.27.141 Port: 19132

[Wiki](https://wiki.thestonedgolem.info/)

[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/the-stoned-golem)

[Dynmap](https://thestonedgolem.live/)
